libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25, set/preserve these runtime system properties before Vert.x/Netty initialization or as nativeTest runtime args: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Use loopback/local HttpServer-based tests for WebClient, forms, redirects, cookies/sessions, caching, and body codecs; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OAuth2WebClient coverage would require the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency, but it is not required for meaningful WebClient coverage and should not be added unless the generated tests intentionally exercise OAuth2-specific APIs.
Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative for whether the JDK 25 Netty properties are sufficient.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The library can be exercised with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and needs no extra Maven dependency or Docker service, but Vert.x 5.0.1 resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final and the existing native run context on JDK 25 needs Netty unsafe-access system properties.
